title: sqllogictest crash on aggregation query with NOT IN clause in HAVING clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER, col3 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO tab1(col0, col1, col2, col3) VALUES (1, 10, 100, 'A'), (2, 20, 200, 'B'), (3, NULL, 300, 'C');
SELECT cor0.col1 FROM tab1 AS cor0 GROUP BY cor0.col1 HAVING NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 WHERE cor0.col1 IS NULL);
SELECT cor0.col1 FROM tab1 AS cor0 GROUP BY cor0.col1 HAVING NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 WHERE cor0.col2 IS NULL);
SELECT cor0.col1 FROM tab1 AS cor0 WHERE cor0.col1 IS NOT NULL AND cor0.col1 NOT IN (SELECT col1 FROM tab1 WHERE col2 > 150);
key_bug_features: NOT IN clause in HAVING clause with aggregation query
